pages.text: A relic of watchfulness rather than speed. It is strongest when you hold your ground and let the Eye do the seeing.

$(l)Default behavior$()$(br)$(li)Can grant permanent Night Vision$(li)Reveals nearby monsters with Glowing$(li)Reveals farther while still than while moving$(li)When you are grounded, not sprinting, and moving slowly enough, you gain an Oakskin-like Resistance effect
$(l)In plain English$()$(br)The Eye rewards calm footing. If you stop sprinting and stand your ground, it turns from a scouting relic into a defensive one.
